title: Asian shares are mostly higher, tracking Wall Street's fresh records, and oil prices fall
description: Asian shares are mostly higher and oil prices have fallen after the U.S. stock market rose to records. South Korea's Kospi jumped more than 2% and Taiwan's benchmark also surged as the boom in artificial intelligence drove heavy buying of computer chipmakers and other technology companies. On Tuesday, the S&P 500 climbed 0.6% after trading resumed following Monday’s holiday, setting another all-time high. The Nasdaq composite rallied 1.2% to its own record, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average dipped 0.2% from its all-time high. Micron Technology led the way, and its stock has more than tripled so far this year. Treasury yields eased.
content:

title: Asian shares mostly higher, tracking Wall Street's fresh records, oil prices fall
description: BANGKOK, May 27:  Asian shares were mostly higher on Wednesday and oil prices fell after the US stock market rose to more records. South Korea’s Kospi jumped nearly 5 per cent and Taiwan’s benchmark also surged as the boom in artificial intelligence drove heavy buying of computer chipmakers and other technology companies. In Tokyo, the Nikkei 225 also was lifted by gains for tech-related shares, climbing 1.3 per cent to 65,816.62. It topped 66,000 for the first time in intraday […]

title: Hackers are using AI to find security flaws no scanner can catch, Google warns
description: For the first time, hackers have used artificial intelligence to find and exploit a security flaw that no automated scanner would have caught – and Google says only its own active monitoring stopped a mass attack.
content:
